title: bonnaya oppositifolia
intro: Bonnaya oppositifolia, also known as the 'Wild Violet', is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bonnaya oppositifolia include treating fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a poultice to reduce inflammation and promote healing.
